description: CompositionGreen ethnic print kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, printed border panel on the sleeve hems, printed panel extending from the neckline to the bust that has sequin detailing and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis piece of art by vishudh is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look, or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
